news.Title: 外資認錯？狂砸670億回頭掃貨　台股血脈噴張刷爆歷史新高
news.Content:
台股今日強勢上漲，加權指數終場大漲1778.51點，收在40,705.14點，不僅刷新收盤歷史新高，也寫下史上最大單日漲點紀錄。成交量同步放大至1.04兆元，在資金全面回流帶動下，三大法人大舉買超780.34億元，其中外資買超669.76億元，創下史上第六大紀錄，成為推升行情的關鍵動能。

從籌碼面觀察，外資終結連續四天賣出轉為強力回補，單日買超近670億元。自營商也買超89.4億元，終止連續兩天賣出的走勢。投信則持續加碼21.18億元，已連續九天買進，顯示內外資同步偏多。

盤面資金動向方面，交易所交易基金（ETF）成交熱度持續升溫。其中，00981A（主動統一台股增長）以45.4萬張成交量居冠，00631L（元大台灣50正2）與00632R（元大台灣50反1）分居二、三名。

進一步觀察外資買盤流向，資金明顯流向高股息ETF與記憶體族群。元大高股息（0056）單日獲外資買超逾5.8萬張居冠，成為最受青睞的高股息基金。個股方面，群創、華邦電與南亞科同步獲資金青睞，其中華邦電明日召開法說會，市場預估可望繳出單季獲利佳績。由於記憶體後市仍看好，法人預期華邦電股價有望回到百元之上。

南亞科今日公佈2026年4月份自結合併營收為新台幣254.91億元，首度突破200億元大關，月增40.29%、年增717.33%，創單月營收歷史新高，顯示記憶體產業景氣持續升溫。

統計數據顯示，今年外資買超前十大交易日中已有四日落在2026年，顯示資金進出節奏加快且規模放大，對台股影響力顯著提升。

news.Title: Option Volatility And Earnings Report For May 4 - 8
news.Content:
Most of the Mag-7 how now reported after a big week last week, but we still have some important companies reporting this week. We have Palantir (PLTR), Advanced Micro Devices (AMD), Coinbase (COIN), Coreweave (CRWV), Arista Networks (ANET), Arm Holdings (ARM), Shopify (SHOP) and Uber Technologies (UBER) all reporting in what shapes as a busy and pivotal week for stocks.

Before a company reports earnings, implied volatility is usually high because the market is unsure about the outcome of the report. Speculators and hedgers create huge demand for the company’s options which increases the implied volatility, and therefore, the price of options.

More News from Barchart

Amazon's Massive Capex Spending Reduces FCF to a Trickle - But Does the Market Care?

Oil Shock + Hawkish Fed = Major EUR/USD Downside? Don't Miss These Trading Opportunities

Why Microsoft’s Misfires Could Create a Contrarian Opportunity in MSFT Stock

Get exclusive insights with the FREE Barchart Brief newsletter. Subscribe now for quick, incisive midday market analysis you won't find anywhere else.

After the earnings announcement, implied volatility usually drops back down to normal levels.

Let’s take a look at the expected range for these stocks. To calculate the expected range, look up the option chain and add together the price of the at-the-money put option and the at-the-money call option. Use the first expiry date after the earnings date. While this approach is not as accurate as a detailed calculation, it does serve as a reasonably accurate estimate.

Nothing of note

Option traders can use these expected moves to structure trades. Bearish traders can look at selling bear call spreads outside the expected range.

Bullish traders can sell bull put spreads outside the expected range, or look at naked puts for those with a higher risk tolerance.

Neutral traders can look at iron condors. When trading iron condors over earnings, it is best to keep the short strikes outside the expected range.

When trading options over earnings, it is best to stick to risk defined strategies and keep position size small. If the stock makes a larger than expected move and the trade suffers a full loss, it should not have more than a 1-3% effect on your portfolio.

news.Title: 台積發哥信驊組隊放煙火！台股噴1778點炸史上最狂｜Yahoo財經掃描
news.Content:
受到企業盈餘創佳績、油價走跌激勵，美股四大指數漲跌互見，道瓊工業指數下跌0.31%，標普500指數上漲0.29%，那斯達克指數上漲0.89%，費城半導體指數上漲0.87%，其中標普500指數、那斯達克指數與費城半導體指數同步刷新歷史收盤新高。個股方面，蘋果財報優於預期帶動股價走揚，微軟、亞馬遜等大型科技股同步收漲，輝達則小幅拉回跌0.6%，顯示科技股買盤仍偏熱，但資金追價力道略有分化；台積電ADR上漲0.41%。

亞股方面部分走揚，日股休市，韓股勁揚5.12%，再創收盤新高，香港恆生指數上漲1.33%，陸股同樣休市。

回到台股，加權指數今日大漲1778.51點、收40,705.14點，漲幅4.57%，創史上最大漲點並站上4萬點大關，成交金額放大至1兆84.4億元； 權王台積電(2330) 強勢領軍，盤中最高衝上2285元，終場大漲140元、收2275元，創下史上盤中最大上漲金額； 聯發科(2454) 、 信驊(5274) 也同步發力，帶動電子權值股氣勢全面點火。

📝盤點熱門股：主動統一台股增長、元大台灣50正2、元大台灣50反1

今日熱門成交股方面，前五名以ETF與電子股為主，顯示資金在指數創高之際持續透過多元工具積極布局。買盤最旺的是 主動統一台股增長(00981A) ，單日成交達45.43萬張居冠，在台股站上4萬點帶動ETF熱度升溫下，資金持續湧入，推升成交動能與股價同步走揚。

其餘ETF方面， 元大台灣50正2(00631L) 走揚、 元大台灣50反1(00632R) 小跌，在大盤強勢上攻背景下，槓桿與反向ETF同步放量，顯示市場多空操作並行、資金進出頻繁。

個股部分，半導體股 聯電(2303) 受惠先前法說會釋出22奈米銷售創高與漲價利多，吸引買盤進駐，帶動股價走揚並推升成交量；記憶體股 旺宏(2337) 則延續產業題材關注度，交投維持熱絡，股價小幅走揚，反映資金持續在電子族群間輪動布局。

📌三大法人買賣超

三大法人今日合計買超780.34億元，籌碼面明顯偏多方。外資買超669.75億元，成為推升盤面最大火力來源；投信買超21.18億元，延續加碼步調，為內資提供支撐；自營商買超89.41億元，操作也偏積極。整體來看，外資強勢回補搭配內資同步偏多，讓法人籌碼呈現全面買超格局。

✨本日議題股：封測概念股

AI訂單與先進封裝題材持續發酵，帶動資金湧向相關供應鏈。封測三雄同步強攻， 日月光投控(3711) 盤中衝上525元寫歷史新高， 京元電(2449) 、 精測(6510) 也亮燈漲停，反映市場看好AI與高效能運算需求延伸至封測端；其中...... 點我看更多

👥國發基金聚寶盆：

台股走大行情，國發基金也變「隱形大贏家」，光靠 台積電(2330) 今年股價衝高，帳面獲利就估逾1.2兆元，且手中還有 世界(5347)、 波若威(3163) 、 達運光電(8045) 等飆股助攻，其中達運光電今年漲幅更傳逾600%，績效不輸神山；除了價差驚人，國發基金長抱台積電也坐享股利金雞母，首季已領約66億元股息，全年有望進帳...... 點我看更多

🔭重大財經事件展望

周二國際財經焦點，先看美國市場，將公布3月營建許可、JOLTS職位空缺與勞動力流動調查，以及4月綜合PMI，市場將觀察就業降溫、房市動能與服務業景氣變化；歐洲方面，英國將公布4月新車銷售，車市需求與消費力道可作為觀察重點；亞太區方面，中國、日本適逢勞動節、兒童節休市，區域交投氣氛相對清淡；陸港澳方面，香港將公布第一季GDP年增率、私人消費支出與進出口年增率等經濟數據，廣交會第三期也將結束，出口動能與內需表現將牽動市場信心。

台灣方面，國內焦點包括富邦投信第一檔主動台股ETF上市記者會，主動式ETF話題有望延續市場熱度；企業動態方面，股東會可關注 台鋼建設(3521) ，法說會則聚焦 華邦電(2344) 、 穩懋(3105) 、 新唐(4919) 、 世界(5347) 、 環球晶(6488) 、 富世達(6805) 、 達發(6526) 與 明基材(8215) 等，後續營運展望與產業景氣看法可望牽動盤面資金輪動。

市場變化難捉摸？面對股市的大起大落，總會有看不懂、跟不上、難決策的時刻！ Yahoo財經掃描 每個台股交易日晚間6點上菜，整理市場最重要的財經熱點，從國際財經趨勢、產業焦點到個股異動，迅速掌握投資脈動，帶你快人一步，掌握市場先機。

註：加權指數成交金額含盤後定價，不含零股、鉅額、拍賣及標購

（核稿編輯：陳景淵）

news.Title: Meet 3 Upcoming Monster Artificial Intelligence (AI) IPOs That Will Soon Join Meta, Tesla, and Broadcom in the $1 Trillion Club
news.Content: Not long ago, the thought of a stock surpassing $1 trillion seemed unfathomable. Today, there are several stocks with market caps of more than $1 trillion, some of which have surpassed $4 trillion. This is largely due to the emergence of artificial intelligence (AI) and the belief that the technology will change life as we know it. The large tech companies best positioned to take advantage of this trend have seen their stocks melt up. Furthermore, private companies are expected to go public at stratospheric valuations. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Upcoming AI IPOs like SpaceX and OpenAI are expected to join Meta, Tesla, and Broadcom in the $1 trillion market cap club.
• SpaceX, led by Elon Musk, is a pioneer in the space economy and is reportedly close to achieving sovereign AI.
• OpenAI, responsible for ChatGPT, could conduct an IPO as soon as Q4 2026, with potential to raise $100 billion and value at $1 trillion.
• Investors are advised to wait several months after IPOs to consider buying due to potential volatility and lock-up expirations.
news.Keywords: AI IPOs, market capitalization, SpaceX, OpenAI, venture capital

news.Title: Want to Buy SpaceX Before Its IPO? This Venture Fund Crushed the S&P 500 and Nasdaq-100 in the Past Year.
news.Content: In the past year, the S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) advanced 27% and the Nasdaq-100 advanced 38%. Those are impressive returns by any standard, but the Ark Venture Fund (NASDAQMUTFUND: ARKVX) soared 67% because it is heavily invested in two private companies: SpaceX and OpenAI. Here's what investors should know. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The Ark Venture Fund has significantly outperformed the S&P 500 and Nasdaq-100, with 80% of its assets in private companies like SpaceX and OpenAI.
• SpaceX's valuation has increased 730% to $1.25 trillion since Ark took a stake, while OpenAI's valuation surged 870% to $852 billion.
• Both SpaceX and OpenAI are reportedly planning to list shares in 2026, which could be catalysts for further price appreciation.
• The Ark Venture Fund is a relatively risky and inconvenient investment due to its interval fund structure and limited liquidity options.
news.Keywords: venture fund, private equity, SpaceX, OpenAI, stock performance

news.Title: Microsoft Is a Mess. Is the "Magnificent Seven" Stock a Buy in May or Better Avoided?
news.Content: Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) has rallied from its 2026 lows in a similar fashion to its "Magnificent Seven" peers, Nvidia , Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) , Apple , Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) , Meta Platforms , and Tesla . But even with that recovery, Microsoft is still down 15.7% year to date -- a significant underperformance relative to both the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite . Here's why Microsoft's investment thesis has gotten more complicated, and how to approach this stock right now. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft's (MSFT) year-to-date performance is down 15.7%, significantly underperforming the S&P 500 and Nasdaq.
• The company expects capital expenditures to exceed $40 billion in Q4 fiscal 2026, with a full-year forecast of $190 billion for calendar 2026.
• This drastic increase in capex is impacting profitability and free cash flow, which decreased 22.2% year-over-year in the latest quarter.
• Microsoft's commercial bookings decreased by 46% due to lower commitments from OpenAI, which has expanded its partnership with AWS.
news.Keywords: capital expenditures, AI spending, profitability, free cash flow, OpenAI partnership

news.Title: Nvidia, Palantir, and Broadcom Are Sending Shockwaves Through Wall Street With This $4.6 Billion Warning
news.Content: Nothing has captured the attention of investors since the advent and proliferation of the internet in the mid-1990s quite like the rise of artificial intelligence (AI) . Empowering software and systems with the tools to make split-second, autonomous decisions is a multitrillion-dollar addressable market. Arguably, no companies have benefited more from the evolution of AI ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Insiders at Nvidia, Palantir, and Broadcom have engaged in heavy net-selling activity, totaling approximately $4.6 billion over the past year.
• Nvidia has seen no insider purchases, while Palantir and Broadcom insiders have made minimal purchases.
• The trailing 12-month price-to-sales (P/S) ratios for Nvidia (24), Broadcom (28), and Palantir (81) suggest they are historically expensive.
• This insider selling and high valuation may signal that insiders do not view these AI stocks as bargains.
news.Keywords: insider selling, stock valuation, P/S ratio, AI stocks, market signals

news.Title: AI chipmaker Cerebras targets $115-$125 share price in US IPO, source says

news.AI_Summary:

• Cerebras' revenue rose to $510 million in the year ended December 31, up from $290.3 million a year earlier.

news.Keywords: AI chipmaker, IPO, valuation, revenue growth, wafer-scale engine

news.Title: Alphabet Just Showed Why It's a Top AI Stock to Buy Right Now
news.Content: If I had told investors last year that Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) would be one of the top artificial intelligence (AI) companies, I may have been laughed at. Alphabet has completed a phenomenal comeback and is easily among the best AI businesses out there, and its ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet's Google Cloud revenue surged 63% year-over-year to $20 billion in Q1, driven by AI-related revenue growth of 800%.
• Google Search revenue accelerated to 19% growth, integrating AI Overviews and AI Mode solutions.
• Alphabet's total revenue grew 22% year-over-year to $109.9 billion, with EPS surging 82% to $5.11.
• The company raised its 2026 capital expenditure budget to $180-$190 billion to expand its data center footprint and AI infrastructure.
news.Keywords: Google Cloud, AI revenue, search business, capital expenditure, revenue growth

news.Title: Will Bitcoin Ever Be More Valuable Than Apple? You Might Be Surprised at What Prediction Markets Say.
news.Content: Can Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) -- the world's most valuable cryptocurrency -- ever surpass Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) -- the world's most valuable company -- in market cap? As might be expected, there's a prediction market for that. On Polymarket, there's currently a 7% chance of Bitcoin surpassing Apple in market cap before 2027. Here's what would ...
news.AI_Summary:
• There is a 7% chance of Bitcoin surpassing Apple's market cap before 2027, according to prediction markets.
• An AI catalyst for Bitcoin could involve its use for micro-payments by AI agents, leveraging its divisibility into Satoshis.
• Other factors, such as a potential decline in Apple's attractiveness post-Tim Cook or a breakthrough device from OpenAI, could impact Apple's valuation.
• Anthropic has a 20% chance of being worth more than Bitcoin by year-end, highlighting the critical role of AI investment theses.
news.Keywords: Bitcoin, market capitalization, AI catalyst, prediction markets, cryptocurrency

news.Title: This Major Tech Stock Could Be the Biggest Loser From AI
news.Content: In the past few days after the four biggest AI "hyperscalers" reported earnings April 29, Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) stock has gotten hammered. The shares have declined by about 9% since then and are down 7.8% year to date. Meanwhile, other AI stocks are up. Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) shares have gained 10% ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms (META) stock has declined about 9% since its earnings report, underperforming other AI stocks like Alphabet and Amazon.
• Meta expects to spend $125 billion to $145 billion on capital expenditures in 2026, an increase from prior estimates.
• Investors are concerned about Meta's massive AI capex spending without a clear monetization strategy, unlike competitors selling AI services.
• Meta's AI investments are considered highly speculative, and the company lacks a clear path for making money with AI, potentially making it the biggest loser in the AI race.
news.Keywords: AI capex, monetization strategy, speculative investment, competitive landscape, stock performance

news.Title: The Fed Just Did Something It Hasn't Done Since 1992. Here's What It Means.
news.Content: As expected, the Federal Reserve didn't change its policy rate at last week's meeting. But something monumental did happen at the two-day meeting of the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC), the Fed's interest rate-setting committee. And it has to be considered a negative development for the stock market . Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue » Four ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Four members of the FOMC dissented from the Federal Reserve's monetary policy statement, a rare occurrence not seen since 1992.
• Three members dissented due to objections to language indicating a bias toward easing (rate cuts).
• This dissent suggests that interest rate cuts this year are less likely, especially with Kevin Warsh, Trump's nominee for Fed chair, expected to be confirmed.
• Jerome Powell intends to remain on the Fed Board until a DOJ investigation is concluded, potentially influencing future monetary policy decisions.
news.Keywords: Federal Reserve, FOMC dissent, interest rates, monetary policy, Fed chair nominee

news.Title: Bull vs. Bear: Is Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Stock a Buy or Sell?

news.Keywords: semiconductor manufacturing, AI demand, technological lead, pricing power, capital expenditures

news.Title: 3 Surprising Quantum Computing Stocks Robinhood Investors Love
news.Content: Quantum computing is moving closer to real-world applications, and the pace of technological development -- and the excitement around its possibilities -- has pushed quantum computing stocks to the forefront of many investors' minds. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team ...

news.Keywords: quantum computing, AI models, Nvidia Ising, Alphabet Willow, Microsoft Majorana

news.Title: 台股早盤漲逾1300點再破4萬點 台積電漲100元
news.Content:
美股1日主要指數那斯達克和標普500指數再創新高。台北股市今天（4日）開盤漲301.76點，加權股價指數為39228.39點，成交金額新台幣153.21億元；開盤不到1分鐘即上漲破千點，早盤加權指數最高為40297.72點，上漲1371.09點。台積電漲100元到2235元。

其他權值股早盤表現，鴻海上漲5元，為224.5元；聯發科攻上漲停2870元；台達電上漲10元，為2175元。

台股4月30日收在38926.63點，美股四大指數終場道瓊工業指數終場下跌152.87點，或0.31%，收在49499.27點；標準普爾500指數上漲21.11點，或0.29%，收在7230.12點；以科技股為主的那斯達克指數上漲222.14點，或0.89%，收在25114.45點；費城半導體指數上漲91.639點，或0.87%，收在10595.340點。AI晶片龍頭輝達（NVDA-US）下跌0.5%、台積電ADR上漲0.4%。

news.Title: Nvidia’s $1 million problem is getting worse in China
news.Content: The worldwide race for artificial intelligence is producing no lack of eye-popping figures. Nvidia is the backbone of the AI economy powering data centers , large language models and cloud infrastructure for many of the world’s largest IT businesses. Now scarcity is putting a high premium on the chip giant’s hardware in one of the world’s most crucial AI sectors . Industry sources told Reuters that the B300 AI servers from Nvidia are selling for ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia's B300 AI servers are selling for approximately $1 million in China, double the U.S. price.
• This premium pricing is driven by surging Chinese AI demand, tightened U.S. export restrictions, and crackdowns on chip smuggling.
• Chinese AI model usage has tripled year-over-year, creating a hardware constraint and driving up prices.
• Nvidia maintains a market share of over 55% in China, but rivals like Huawei are accelerating efforts to compete.
news.Keywords: AI servers, China market, export restrictions, supply constraint, pricing power

Analysts note that major U.S. technology firms are significantly raising ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Aggressive AI investments could drive global hyperscale capital expenditure (capex) to $1 trillion by 2027, according to BofA Global Research.
• Major U.S. tech firms are raising spending outlooks, with combined hyperscale capex forecast to exceed $800 billion in 2026, a 67% year-over-year increase.
• Alphabet (GOOGL), Microsoft (MSFT), Amazon (AMZN), and Meta Platforms (META) have substantially increased their 2026 capex guidance.
• Microsoft raised its outlook to $190 billion, Amazon maintained $200 billion, Alphabet projected $180-$190 billion, and Meta projected $135 billion.
news.Keywords: AI investment, hyperscale capex, semiconductor vendors, data center expansion, cloud providers

news.Title: The Best Stocks to Buy With $1,000 Right Now
news.Content: Ask 10 different investors what the best stocks are to buy, and you could very well get 10 different answers. There's admittedly a lot of subjectivity involved. Timing is important, too. If you asked me what the best stocks to buy were five years ago, my response would almost certainly differ from my answer today. Companies' business prospects and market dynamics change. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on a little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly," providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue » ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon (AMZN) is a perennial contender for best stocks to buy, with net sales up 17% year-over-year in Q1 2026 to $181.5 billion.
• AWS revenue soared 28% year-over-year to $37.6 billion, its fastest growth in 15 quarters, and is expected to continue this momentum.
• Amazon's advertising revenue is a success story, with CEO Andy Jassy expecting agentic AI to expand opportunities.
• The company's Leo satellite internet service is projected to be a very large, many-billion-dollar revenue business.
news.Keywords: e-commerce, cloud computing, AWS, AI strategy, satellite internet

news.Title: 5 big analyst AI moves: JPM downgrades Meta; Micron gets a fresh Street-high PT
news.Content: Investing.com -- Here are the biggest analyst moves in the area of artificial intelligence (AI) for this week. This could be the next re-rating catalyst for Nvidia stock, BofA says Ramping up shareholder returns could be the next re-rating catalyst for Nvidia, Bank of America analysts said this week, arguing that a more aggressive capital return program could broaden the chipmaker’s investor base and help close a valuation gap they see as unwarranted. "Increased cash returns could signal sustainability, widen the shareholder base, and help narrow the valuation gap," wrote analysts led by Vivek Arya. Despite being the S&P 500’s ...
news.AI_Summary:
• BofA suggests ramping up shareholder returns could be a catalyst for Nvidia (NVDA), noting its P/E discount compared to Magnificent Seven peers.
• Goldman Sachs reiterates a Buy rating on Microsoft (MSFT) after earnings, seeing a potential inflection point for the stock.
• JPMorgan downgrades Meta Platforms (META) to Neutral due to AI spending risks and limited visibility into its AI product roadmap.
• Micron (MU) receives a fresh Street-high PT, with Mizuho bullish on DRAM and memory due to AI CPU acceleration.
news.Keywords: analyst ratings, AI spending, shareholder returns, P/E ratio, capital return program

news.Title: Forget This Trump eVTOL Darling: A Diversified Defense Contractor Is the Smarter Long‑Term Holding
news.Content: On Nov. 4, 2024, the day before President Donald Trump was reelected as the 47th U.S. President, Vertical Aerospace (NYSE: EVTL) closed at $4.31 per share. A few weeks later, a tidal wave of buying nearly quadrupled the stock to an all-time high of $15.50 per share. But it's been pretty much downhill for Vertical Aerospace ever since. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Vertical Aerospace (EVTL) stock has declined significantly since its peak, despite President Trump's support for the drone industry.
• The company is still two years away from a commercial product and has no revenue, burning $112 million annually.
• Vertical Aerospace is taking on $300 million in new debt and a $500 million line of credit, potentially diluting shareholders by 50%.
• RTX Corp. is presented as a safer aerospace stock choice, with $22.1 billion in Q1 2026 sales and 9% YoY sales growth.
news.Keywords: eVTOL, aerospace, drone industry, cash burn, dilution

news.Title: Warren Buffett's Best Advice for Buying Stocks During Market Uncertainty
news.Content: You might have heard someone say that the Chinese word for "crisis" means "danger" plus "opportunity." While that would be intriguing if true, it reflects a misunderstanding of Mandarin. However, the connection between danger and opportunity aligns well with Warren Buffett's investing philosophy . Dangers seem to be almost everywhere you look in the current market environment. The ongoing war with Iran continues to affect oil prices. President Trump's tariffs add to concerns about resurging inflation. Some experts warn that the widespread ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Warren Buffett's investment philosophy emphasizes being fearful when others are greedy and greedy when others are fearful.
• He also advises that the stock market transfers money from the impatient to the patient, highlighting the importance of a long-term mindset.
• Buffett's approach involves estimating a company's underlying value, making market uncertainty less concerning and potentially beneficial.
• Coca-Cola (KO) is cited as an example of Buffett's philosophy, bought after the 1987 crash and held as a long-term position.
news.Keywords: investment philosophy, market uncertainty, long-term investing, value investing, risk management

news.Title: Is Nvidia's Deal With Oklo a Game Changer?
news.Content: Surging demand for artificial intelligence (AI) is exposing a huge energy crunch as power supplies become the new bottleneck for data centers. Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) and Oklo (NYSE: OKLO) recently announced a collaboration that could reshape how AI data centers are powered. Together with Los Alamos National Laboratory (LANL), the trio ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) and Oklo (OKLO) are collaborating to blend AI computing with nuclear technology to address the energy crunch for data centers.
• The partnership focuses on using Nvidia's AI infrastructure (digital twins, modeling, simulation) to accelerate Oklo's nuclear fuel development.
• Nvidia is investing in energy infrastructure to support AI hyperscalers' demand for carbon-free electricity, employing a vertical integration strategy.
• Oklo remains pre-revenue with multi-year regulatory and construction timelines, indicating execution risk despite the strategic alliance.
news.Keywords: AI data centers, nuclear technology, energy infrastructure, vertical integration, fuel development

news.Title: Alphabet Is Dropping $190 Billion on AI Infrastructure: 3 Semiconductor Stocks Set to Win Big
news.Content: If there was any question about whether the artificial intelligence infrastructure boom is fizzling, the most recent quarterly reports from major tech companies, including Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG) , shed significant light on the topic. Alphabet's management raised its capital expenditures (capex) from the previous range of $175 to $185 billion to the current range of $180 to $190 billion. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet (GOOGL) raised its capital expenditures (capex) guidance for 2026 to $180-$190 billion, primarily for AI spending.
• Broadcom (AVGO) is expected to be a major winner, designing custom processors like Alphabet's TPUs, with AI revenue projected to reach $100 billion by 2027.
• Taiwan Semiconductor (TSM) benefits from increased chip demand, holding about 90% of the advanced processor market and expecting sales to increase over 30% this year.
• Nvidia (NVDA) GPUs remain leading processors for AI data centers, and Alphabet will continue to purchase them despite developing its own TPUs.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, capital expenditures, semiconductor stocks, custom processors, chip demand

news.Title: My Top 5 Stocks to Buy in May
news.Content: With May here, it's time to start trying to predict what stocks are going to be strong performers over the rest of the year. Although I may sound like a broken record, it's safe to say that 2026 will be another year marked by heavy spending on artificial intelligence (AI). This positions a handful of companies to be extreme beneficiaries, and I want to ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet (GOOGL) and Amazon (AMZN) are top picks due to their cloud computing segments, which are experiencing massive data center build-outs.
• Nvidia (NVDA) and Broadcom (AVGO) are benefiting now by providing high-powered processors for data centers, with expected revenue growth of 72% and 63% respectively this year.
• Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSM) is a neutral bet in the AI race, as it is the primary logic chip manufacturer for many leading businesses.
• Nvidia projects global data center spending to reach $3-$4 trillion annually by 2030, indicating extended growth timelines for chipmakers.
news.Keywords: AI spending, cloud computing, data centers, semiconductors, revenue growth

news.Title: SpaceX IPO: Is This the 10X Stock You've Been Waiting For?
news.Content: If you're like me, you've been tracking the upcoming SpaceX initial public offering (IPO) very closely. There are already some ways you can invest in SpaceX shares today . But it's also reasonable to simply wait for the IPO to make shares widely available to the public. Betting markets currently predict that the SpaceX IPO will be announced sometime in June . So we could be just a month away from what should be a record-breaking public debut. While predictions vary, most analysts suspect the company will target a valuation between $1.5 trillion and $1.75 trillion. Recently, there have even ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX's IPO is predicted to be announced in June, with a target valuation between $1.5 trillion and $1.75 trillion, potentially reaching $2 trillion.
• SpaceX has revolutionized the rocket industry by lowering launch costs, enabling opportunities like satellite internet and space-based AI data centers.
• Analysts express bullishness but caution about the astronomical valuation relative to current business production.
• PitchBook pegs SpaceX's valuation between $1.1 trillion and $1.7 trillion, noting the company has not filed public financial statements.
news.Keywords: SpaceX IPO, valuation, satellite internet, AI data centers, rocket industry

news.Title: Why Nike Stock Lost 16% in April
news.Content: Shares of Nike (NYSE: NKE) were among the losers again last month, even as the broad market surged. The sportswear giant fell sharply at the beginning of the month after reporting a disappointing third-quarter earnings report, and it stayed down for the rest of the month after that, even ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nike (NKE) shares fell 16% in April after a disappointing Q3 earnings report, with revenue flat year-over-year (down 3% currency-neutral).
• Earnings per share fell from $0.54 to $0.35, though ahead of estimates.
• Nike dialed back expectations for its recovery, forecasting low single-digit revenue declines for the next three quarters.
• Analysts downgraded the stock or lowered price targets, acknowledging the turnaround will take longer than expected.
news.Keywords: Q3 earnings, revenue guidance, turnaround efforts, analyst downgrades, sportswear

news.Title: Cathie Wood sells $79.9M of strong, surging semiconductor stock
news.Content: When a stock runs 68% in a matter of weeks, even the most convinced bulls start doing the math on what to do next. That appears to be exactly where Cathie Wood found herself with American multinational semiconductor company Advanced Micro Devices ( AMD ). That’s a name ARK Invest has held through volatile stretches and lean years, only to watch it explode higher as agentic Artificial Intelligence ( AI ) demand sent the semiconductor sector into a full sprint. Wood didn't panic. She rebalanced. And she did it with the kind of methodical consistency that characterizes ARK's daily-disclosed trading ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Cathie Wood trimmed $79.9 million of Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) shares across multiple ETFs, rotating proceeds into Alphabet (GOOG) and Meta Platforms (META).
• AMD's stock surged 68% in weeks, driven by agentic AI demand in the semiconductor sector.
• ARK Invest's sales of AMD shares were deliberate and staged, with the majority concentrated between April 24 and May 1.
• The shift indicates Wood's higher conviction bets on Alphabet and Meta following their post-earnings reactions.
news.Keywords: semiconductor stock, AI demand, portfolio rebalancing, earnings reaction, Big Tech

news.Title: Alphabet Is Outgrowing Amazon and Microsoft Where It Matters Most -- Why This Makes Alphabet Stock a Buy
news.Content: For investors trying to figure out which of the big cloud platforms is winning the AI (artificial intelligence) build-out, the most recent batch of earnings reports just delivered an answer that may surprise some. Alphabet 's (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG) latest quarterly results revealed that Google Cloud revenue surged 63% year over year to $20.0 billion. Showing what an incredible feat this is, that growth rate sat well above ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet's (GOOGL) Google Cloud revenue surged 63% year-over-year to $20.0 billion, outpacing Microsoft Azure's 40% growth and Amazon AWS's 28% growth.
• This marks Google Cloud's third consecutive quarter of accelerating growth, with a backlog that nearly doubled in three months.
• Google Cloud's operating income climbed to $6.6 billion, with its operating margin expanding to 32.9%, driven by AI model revenue growth of nearly 800%.

news.Keywords: Google Cloud, AI infrastructure, revenue growth, operating margin, cloud backlog

news.Title: Why Wix.com Stock Plummeted in April
news.Content: April was a generally strong month for U.S. stocks, with the S&P 500 index gaining nearly 10%. As ever, though, a rising market doesn't guarantee a rising share price. One notable outlier during the month was do-it-yourself web design company Wix.com (NASDAQ: WIX) , which fell by more than 17%. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Wix.com (WIX) shares fell over 17% in April, partly due to Anthropic's launch of Claude Design, an AI-powered design product.
• Investors fear AI models could disrupt Wix's business model, which offers tools for non-designers to create websites.
• Wix repurchased nearly 30% of its outstanding shares for over $1.6 billion, a significant spend for a company with under $1.2 billion in cash.
• Analysts became more bearish, with two downgrading their ratings from Buy to Neutral.
news.Keywords: AI disruption, stock performance, share repurchase, analyst sentiment, web design

news.Title: Prediction: This Will be Amazon's Next Big Move
news.Content: Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) has proven its ability to build leading businesses, with the key examples being its dominance in e-commerce and cloud computing. The company, which first sold books online, expanded over the years into grocery, mass merchandise, and more -- and anchored the business in people's daily lives through its Prime membership program. As for cloud, Amazon Web Services (AWS) launched in 2006 and has since developed a vast portfolio of services -- in fact, it's the world's biggest cloud provider. All of this has helped Amazon's earnings climb over time, and in each case, the company has benefited ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon's (AMZN) custom chips, Graviton CPU and Trainium GPU-style product, offer a quality, cost-conscious option, with Trainium2 providing 30% better price performance than standard GPUs.
• Demand for Graviton and Trainium is skyrocketing, with most chips reserved or sold out, and an annual revenue run rate of $20 billion.
• Amazon's next big move is predicted to be creating a stand-alone chip business to sell to third parties, potentially reaching a $50 billion annual revenue run rate.
• AWS revenue growth accelerated to 17% year-over-year in Q1, driven by the AI boom, and the company plans to invest $200 billion in AI this year.
news.Keywords: custom chips, AWS, AI strategy, Trainium, Graviton

news.Title: Can Europe Compete With SpaceX Launch Price? Only If Elon Musk Says "Yes."

news.Title: 【國發基金聚寶盆2】股利就賺飽！台積電今年有望豪領250億股息 中華電陽明華航全是搖錢樹
news.Content:
國發基金股利領飽飽！除漲幅之外，國發基金長年持股不賣，股利也相當受到市場矚目，除手持165.37萬張台積電，首季就豪領66億元股利，換算下來，一年有望狂領超過250億元股利，此外，國發會預估今年也從中華電信領取6400萬元左右的股利，而貨櫃三雄之一的陽明、航空股華航也是國發會的股息來源之一，今年分別能領取9.2億元與4.2億元的現金股利。

國發基金投資不少台灣上市櫃、新創公司，截至截至去年底，共計有69家新興事業，其中就包含台股最知名的護國神山台積電。

而國發基金持股基本都是長年不賣，因此相較於股價漲幅，真正入袋的反倒是「股利收入」，其中，作為台積電大股東的國發基金手握165.37萬張股票，在今年首季就落袋66億元，換算下來，從季配息制的台積電身上，國發會今年有望領取超過250億元的現金股利。

除台積電是國發基金的搖錢樹之外，其實國發基金持股中也有不少「發股息」出名的個股，如電信一哥中華電，今年將發出每股5.2元股息，不過國發基金持股較少，僅0.16%，換算後約可領6400萬元的現金股利。

貨櫃三雄之一的陽明也名列國發基金持股名單，且持股張數達46萬張，今年陽明發放每股2元現金股利，換算下來，國發基金也能入帳9.2億元的股息。

至於航空股華航也是國發基金的搖錢樹之一，今年每股配發0.82元，手持51.9萬張的國發基金則可以領4.2億元的現金股利，也為國發基金挹注不少財富。

許如鎧／財經特派記者，主跑經濟部、電子電信、能源等

news.Title: 【國發基金聚寶盆1】光靠台積電就賺1.2兆元？國發基金手上這3檔績效不輸神山 最狂飆漲600%
news.Content:
台積電在本周股價「追上股號」，最高一度觸及2330元，也為台股首度寫下一筆4萬點的歷史紀錄。在台積電締造新猷的同時，最大受益人之一莫過於大股東國發基金，光是神山今年來就績效就約50%、賺進1.2兆元。不過除台積電外，國發會手中還有不少飆股今年績效都力壓台積電，包含漲幅超過60%的世界先進，甚至還有大漲接近200%的波若威，都是不輸神山的代表個股，而最狂莫過於興櫃股達運光電，漲幅衝破600%。

台積電今年以來，從1550元一路強漲，於本周強勢登上2330元，股價漲幅高達50%，根據國發基金季報顯示，國發基金截止至去年底仍手握6.38%、約165.37萬張台積電，光看今年績效就大賺約1.2兆元。

不過，若以帳面金額增加的數字來看，雖然以台積電最多，國發基金手中其實仍有不少績效亮眼的個股，如台積電旗下的世界先進，今年以來已經從92.1元強漲至本周高點150元，漲幅力壓台積電高達62.8%，若以今年高點171元計算，漲幅更高達85.6%。

若以150元計算，國發會手握29.86萬張世界先進，大約也賺入172億元。

此外，績效最驚人的還有波若威，國發會手握3033張波若威，今年以來已經從398.5元強漲至本周高點1160元，漲幅力壓台積電高達191%，若以今年高點1315元計算，漲幅更高達230%。

若以1160元計算，國發會手握3033張波若威，大約也賺入23億元。

最驚人的還有興櫃股達運光電，光是今年以來就從4.02元狂飆至28.85元，漲幅617%，漲幅也力壓台積電。

許如鎧／財經特派記者，主跑經濟部、電子電信、能源等

news.Title: 【含積ETF比一比2】今年績效前20強出爐！00981A、00992A等8檔主動式ETF入列 「這檔」狂飆74%奪冠
news.Content:
台積電（2330）近期在AI產業熱潮與政策利多加持下，股價一度衝上2,330元新天價，帶動市場資金湧入「含積ETF」，掀起新一波「拉積盤」行情。《Yahoo股市》統整今年來績效表現最強的20檔含積台股ETF，其中富邦台灣半導體（00892）受惠半導體族群強勢表現，今年來大漲74.54%奪冠，另有包括主動統一台股增長（00981A）、主動群益科技創新（00992A）等8檔主動式ETF同步入列，整體漲幅均達4成以上。

金管會近期政策拍板，放寬台股基金與主動式ETF投資單一個股上限至25%，由原先10%大幅鬆綁，等同替主動式ETF開一道門。市場普遍解讀，此舉將為台積電等績優龍頭帶來更具延續性的資金動能，不僅主動式ETF直接受惠，連帶具高含積比重的被動型ETF也可望同步吸金，推升新一波「拉積盤」行情。

《Yahoo股市》統計今年來績效表現最強的20檔含積台股ETF，漲幅均4成起跳，且前三名更衝上7成以上水準。其中，富邦台灣半導體（00892）受惠AI浪潮持續推升半導體資本支出，帶動相關企業營運動能升溫，加上AI晶片、先進製程與高效能運算需求快速成長，連帶推升測試需求，促使全球探針卡市場維持強勁擴張。由於00892同時涵蓋探針卡族群，成為另一大投資亮點，今年來飆漲74.54%，穩居績效冠軍。

第二名為野村臺灣新科技50（00935），以半導體與次世代通訊為兩大核心布局，聚焦先進製程、記憶體、電源管理等半導體族群，並搭配高速傳輸、低軌衛星與資料中心建設等通訊題材，今年來大漲71.12%；主動統一台股增長（00981A）則以70.67%漲幅躋身第三名，自去年5月底掛牌以來績效表現優異，經理人陳釧瑤更被廣大網友封為「瑤池金母」，引發市場熱議，截至4月30日，規模來到2369.8億元，續創新高。

值得留意的是，本次前20強中共有8檔主動式ETF入列，除了00981A之外，還有主動第一金台股優選（00994A）、主動群益科技創新（00992A）、主動台新優勢成長（00987A）、主動中信台灣卓越（00995A）、主動復華未來50（00991A）、主動野村台灣50（00985A）與主動群益台灣強棒（00982A），全數繳出逾4成漲幅佳績。

馮萱榕／財經特派記者，主跑財政部、電腦通路、觀光餐飲等

news.Title: 【含積ETF比一比1】台積電太貴買不下手？一表看台股ETF「含積量」前20名 6檔股價不到30元
news.Content:
金管會放寬基金與主動式ETF單一個股投資上限至25%的「台積電條款」正式上路，激勵台積電（2330）股價於4月27日衝上2,330元歷史高點，也讓「高含積ETF」成為市場追價焦點。《Yahoo股市》盤點「含積量」前20名台股ETF一次看，其中以有「小台積」之稱的富邦科技（0052）持有近7成最具代表性；同時鎖定「含積量」至少3成以上、目前股價不到30元的「高積低價」ETF，共有6檔順勢出線，適合小資族輕鬆入手。

0052台積電比重68.57%居「含積ETF」之冠

隨著AI伺服器、半導體與高效能運算需求擴大，台股企業盈餘持續上修，推動大盤屢創新高。觀察台股ETF中，共有48檔成分股中有台積電，進一步篩選持有權重前20名，以富邦科技（0052）持有68.57%居冠；其次為富邦台50（006208）與元大台灣50（0050），權重分別為61.55%、61.53%。其餘包括富邦公司治理（00692）、元大MSCI台灣（006203）、富邦摩台（0057）、元大電子（0053），含積量皆超過5成。

以持有張數來看，0050持有台積電高達47萬張遙遙領先，006208亦持有逾11萬張，位列第二名。

6檔股價不到30元！009816最親民

若從「入手門檻」觀察，像是006208、0050這類高含積量傳統ETF雖然績效出色，但入場門檻相對較高，以006208最新收盤價209.75元計算，一張成本高達近21萬元，對於規畫長期存股的小資族而言，可能需要更充裕的資金準備才能有效投資。

而根據CMoney最新統計，目前含積量3成以上、股價低於30元的台股「高積低價」ETF共計6檔，包括中信臺灣智慧50（00912）、凱基台灣TOP50（009816）、玉山市值動能50（009803）、華南永昌優選50（009808）、凱基優選30（00938），以及富邦淨零ESG50（009809）。

以009803為例，最新收盤價為19.16元，等同不到2萬元即可買進一張，今年來更大漲49.57%，績效表現亮眼，絲毫不遜於其他老牌市值型ETF；若觀察009816，股價僅13.05元，相當於一張約1.3萬元即可入手，自今年2月掛牌以來即引爆投資人搶進熱潮，上市不到3個月資產規模便突破千億元，今年以來績效亦達3成水準，讓小資族也能以低門檻間接參與台積電行情。

馮萱榕／財經特派記者，主跑財政部、電腦通路、觀光餐飲等

news.Content: Key Points Record Q1: Revenue was $342.1 million (up 105% YoY, 23% sequential) with non-GAAP gross margin of 47.2% and operating margin of 18.2%, driven by embedded controllers, Ferri-series, and boot-drive momentum. • Rambus (RMBS) shares plunged 21.2% after Baird downgraded the stock to Neutral from Outperform.
